# terrible_community_general_sensu_subscription (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The name of the channel.

### Optional

- `backup` (Boolean) Create a backup file (if yes), including the timestamp information so you can get the original file back if you somehow clobbered it incorrectly.
- `path` (String) Path to the subscriptions JSON file.
- `state` (String) Whether the machine should subscribe or unsubscribe from the channel.

### Read-Only

- `reasons` (String) The reasons why the module changed or did not change something.
